priorities.title: Musubi Strong growth & brand continuity
priorities.note: The highest-priority lane. Preserve the brand system across content, products, ads, and site; reduce the content bottleneck; grow Instagram while keeping cultural integrity.

priorities.title: Shared AI memory
priorities.note: Keep one source of truth across assistants and distill conversations into durable memory instead of raw transcripts.

priorities.title: Broader life & work context
priorities.note: Grow the brain beyond Musubi so it also supports work, game dev, articles, and personal context, keeping anything sensitive protected.

priorities.title: Game development (Rome TD)
priorities.note: Keep Rome TD in a clear lane so specs, decisions, and gameplay validation persist and can resume without re-briefing.

priorities.title: Professional UX research
priorities.note: Enough context to support reports, synthesis, and career materials, without exposing confidential client detail.

guardrails: Be honest, push back when warranted, and quality-check before delivering.
Musubi voice: quiet pride, cultural respect, family, food, Hawaiʻi roots, strength without gym-hype.
JB has Hawaiʻi family roots but is SoCal diaspora, not kamaʻāina. Never position him as a local insider.
No gatekeeping, no tourist-shaming, no “real local” policing.
Palette restraint: Black + Bone + Hibiscus Red + at most one supporting color.
The 5% Maui Strong donation is a fact, not a sales pitch.
